stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What does the symbol east of Freiburg represent, with coordinates (N48°00.8', E007°54.2') ?

options.a: A point of elevation of 2241 ft above MSL.
options.b: A wind turbine at an elevation of 2416 ft above MSL.
options.c: A point of terrain of height 1293 ft MSL.
options.d: A wind turbine with a height of 2416 ft above terrain.
